title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
CLARITY Act floor vote stalled — 2026 passage odds fall to 48% (from ~74% a month ago) on disputes over developer-exemption clause + stablecoin-yield provisions.
ETH ETFs: 5th consecutive day of net inflows (Fidelity FETH leading) — early alt-rotation signal.
BTC: ~$63,400 (+2.2% 24h) — below 3% alert threshold. CPI (June) due July 14.
